content.problemStatement:
The droid R2-D2 is travelling in space with a special mission. In space, there are NNN planets (numbered 111 through NNN) and MMM bidirectional space highways. Each space highway connects two planets and in order to use it, R2-D2 needs to have a sufficiently high status level.

The droid‚Äôs mission consists of QQQ stages. In each stage, there are two planets xxx and yyy such that the droid should start the stage at planet xxx with some initial status level LLL (L‚â•0L \ge 0L‚â•0) and travel to planet yyy. For each valid iii, when R2-D2 is at planet iii (including the initial planet xxx), he may increase his status level by AiA_iAi‚Äã; it is not allowed to increase the status level multiple times on the same planet in the same stage. Find the minimum value of LLL such that it is possible for R2-D2 to reach planet yyy or determine that it is impossible to reach planet yyy for any LLL.

Note that the level R2-D2 has at the end of each stage is not carried over to the next stages (he may start the next stage with a lower initial status level).
constraints: the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 400,000400,000400,000
the sum of MMM over all test cases does not exceed 400,000400,000400,000
the sum of QQQ over all test cases does not exceed 400,000400,000400,000
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 4,0004,0004,000
the sum of MMM over all test cases does not exceed 4,0004,0004,000
the sum of QQQ over all test cases does not exceed 4,0004,0004,000
**Subtask #2 (28 points):** Ai=0A_i = 0Ai‚Äã=0 for each valid iii
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and MMM.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã.
Each of the following MMM lines contains three space separated integers UUU, VVV and WWW denoting that there is a space highway between planets UUU and VVV and R2-D2 may use this highway only if his status level is at least WWW.
The next line contains a single integer QQQ.
The following QQQ lines describe stages. Each of these lines contains two space-separated integers xxx and yyy.
content.outputFormat: For each stage, print a single line containing one integer ‚Äï the minimum status level required to complete the stage, or ‚àí1-1‚àí1 if it is impossible to complete this stage.
